root.name: Add Process Box 'Proc 3' on Slide 8
root.description: Evaluates whether a new purple process box labeled 'Proc 3' was successfully added to slide 8 next to existing processes

children.name: New Process Box Added
children.description: Verifies that a new process box with text 'Proc 3' was added to slide 8

children.name: Process Box with 'Proc 3' Text Present
children.description: Checks if there is a shape/textbox containing 'Proc 3' text on slide 8

children.name: Process Box is Purple Color
children.description: Verifies that the 'Proc 3' process box has purple color

children.name: Positioning Next to Existing Processes
children.description: Verifies that the new 'Proc 3' box is positioned appropriately next to existing process boxes

children.name: No Unintended Changes
children.description: Ensures that only the intended changes were made and no other slides or elements were modified unintentionally

children.name: No Changes to Other Slides
children.description: Verifies that slides other than slide 8 were not modified

children.name: No Unintended Animation/Transition Changes
children.description: Verifies that no animations or transitions were added, removed, or modified unintentionally

metadata.task: On slide 8, add a new process box 'Proc 3' in purple color next to the existing processes.
